_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 deficiency drives metabolic reprogramming in ER+ breast cancer.

_contextSnippet: When we measured ER signaling via phosphorylation at the ERK activation-associated S118 site, we saw that NF1-45 cells had decreased active and total ERα activation at baseline and following estradiol (E2) stimulation
details: Successfully detected decreased active and total ERα activation at baseline and following estradiol stimulation in NF1-45 cells
